summary: Iteration 69 - DC Delivery enhancements (invoice_no, rst_no, bags_used, cash_paid, diesel_paid), auto-entries for Cash Book & Gunny Bags, Invoice print endpoint, and GST Ledger feature. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully verified - delivery form with all new fields, delivery table with new columns, print invoice button, GST Ledger tab with summary cards and opening balance dialog.
seed_data_creation: Test DC and delivery created during testing, cleaned up after. GST opening balance saved: CGST=7000, SGST=7000, IGST=1500
context_for_next_testing_agent: DC Delivery now has additional fields: invoice_no, rst_no, bags_used, cash_paid, diesel_paid. Auto-entries are created when cash_paid (party_type=Truck) or diesel_paid (party_type=Diesel) are set - these go to cash_transactions as nikasi. Bags used creates gunny_bags entry with txn_type=out and bag_type=new. Delete delivery cleans up auto-entries using reference patterns 'delivery:{id[:8]}' and 'delivery_diesel:{id[:8]}'. GST Ledger is in Cash Book & Ledgers tab and computes from purchase_vouchers, sale_vouchers, and gunny_bags collections. GST Opening Balance can be set per KMS year.

backend_tests: POST /api/dc-deliveries with new fields (invoice_no, rst_no, bags_used, cash_paid, diesel_paid) - returns all fields
POST /api/dc-deliveries with cash_paid > 0 - creates cash_transactions entry with party_type=Truck, reference=delivery:{id[:8]}
POST /api/dc-deliveries with diesel_paid > 0 - creates cash_transactions entry with party_type=Diesel, reference=delivery_diesel:{id[:8]}
POST /api/dc-deliveries with bags_used > 0 - creates gunny_bags entry with txn_type=out, bag_type=new, reference=delivery:{id[:8]}
DELETE /api/dc-deliveries/{id} - cleans up all auto-created entries (cash and bags)
GET /api/dc-deliveries/invoice/{id} - returns HTML invoice with all delivery details
GET /api/gst-ledger - returns opening_balance, entries, summary, total_entries
GET /api/gst-ledger/opening-balance?kms_year=2025-2026 - returns igst, sgst, cgst, kms_year
PUT /api/gst-ledger/opening-balance - saves IGST/SGST/CGST values per KMS year
GET /api/dc-deliveries - returns all new fields in response
frontend_verified: DC Tracker page accessible via 'DC (Payments)' tab
New DC button opens DC form dialog
DC form has fields: DC Number, Date, Quantity, Rice Type, Godown, Deadline, Notes
DC row expandable showing deliveries for that DC
Add Delivery button visible when DC expanded
Delivery form has Invoice Number field [data-testid=delivery-form-invoice]
Delivery form has RST Number field [data-testid=delivery-form-rst]
Delivery form has Beg (Govt Bags) field [data-testid=delivery-form-bags] with hint 'Govt bags se minus hoga'
Delivery form has Cash Paid field [data-testid=delivery-form-cash] with hint 'Cash Book auto entry'
Delivery form has Diesel Paid field [data-testid=delivery-form-diesel] with hint 'Truck payment auto entry'
Deliveries table shows columns: Date, Qty (Q), Invoice, RST, Vehicle, Bags, Cash, Diesel, Godown
Delivery row shows Invoice No, RST No, Bags count, Cash amount (₹), Diesel amount (₹)
Print Invoice button (file icon) visible in delivery row actions
Cash Book & Ledgers tab shows GST Ledger sub-tab
GST Ledger tab shows 4 summary cards: Opening Balance, GST Credit (Purchase), GST Debit (Sale), Current Balance
GST Opening Balance button opens dialog with CGST, SGST, IGST input fields
GST Opening Balance dialog shows FY year in title
Save button in GST OB dialog saves and shows success toast
GST Ledger table shows columns: Date, Type, Voucher, Party, CGST, SGST, IGST, Bal CGST, Bal SGST, Bal IGST
Auto-entries from delivery visible in Cash Transactions (party_type: Truck/Diesel, reference: delivery:xxx)
